reviews.name: 함아랑
reviews.content:
🧡아랑이의 찐리뷰🧡
하이. 나 함아랑🐷
내 이름 걸고 출시한 타이니 브러쉬 후기 올려본다ㅋ
일단 쁘띠한 사이즈👏🏻 상콤한 레몬컬러💛 내 취향을 저격해찌🔫 기왕이면 이뿐게 좋자나ㅋ 또 외출용으로도 페이스용으로도 넘 좋지ㅋ 난 그래서 카페, 촬영장 갈때 늘 가지고 다녀✊🏻 사이즈가 작기 때문에 겨드랑이나 머즐 빗기에도 안성맞춤이구⭐이정도면 하나씩은 소장 해야한다고 본다.ㅋㅋㅋ
나 함돼랑은 이제 얘 없인 못살아~~🐷💋
reviews.content_en:
🧡 Ham-A-Rang's Honest Review 🧡
Hey, it's me, Ham-A-Rang 🐷
I'm dropping a review on the Tiny Brush that was released with my name on it lol
First of all, the cute little size 👏🏻 and that zesty lemon color 💛 - it totally hits my style 🔫 And of course, everything's better when it looks this cute right? lol Plus it's amazing for both on-the-go and everyday use at home! That's why I always bring it with me when I go to cafes or photo shoots ✊🏻 Because it's so small, it's perfect for brushing armpits and the muzzle area ⭐ I honestly think everyone needs to have one of these 😂😂😂
Me, Ham-A-Rang, literally can't live without this anymore~~🐷💋

reviews.name: 꾸부장 꾸루
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
안녕하세요 꾸부장 꾸루입니다! 빗질을 너무너무 싫어하는 전형적인 개린이이구요. 말티즈의 부드러운 반곱슬털과 푸들의 꼬불꼬불 곱슬털이 섞인 특징의 모질이에요! 일단 타이니브러쉬는 사이즈가 작아서 얼굴같은 부위를 빗어줄때 조금 더 잘 참아줄수 있어요. 우리엄마가 산 작은사이즈 슬리커는 너무 아프게 털이 당겨져서 앙 물어버린게 한 두번이 아닌데, 이건 부드럽게 빗어져여! 저처럼 젠틀한 스타일이랄까. 빗질 못참고 싫어하는 강쥐 엄마들 특징 알죠?? 좋다는 빗은 죄다 사서 맨날 나한테 테스트한다고!! 으..ㅠㅠ 너무 싫지만 그중에 저 꾸부장이 참아줄 수 있는 몇 안되는 빗 중 베스트가 바로 <타이니 브러쉬> 라는 점!! 정말 높이 삽니다. 출근하자마자 타이니 브러쉬로 열심히 그루밍하는 나는야 멋쟁이 부장님!
reviews.content_en:
🧡 Employee Dog's Honest Review 🧡
Hi everyone, I'm Deputy Chief Kuru! I'm a typical dog newbie who absolutely hates getting brushed. I have a unique coat mix of soft, slightly wavy Maltese fur and curly, fluffy Poodle fur! Anyway, because the Tiny Brush is small, I can tolerate it better when they brush areas like my face. My mom bought a small slicker brush before, and it pulled my fur so painfully that I've bitten her more than once or twice, but this one brushes so gently! It's got this gentle style, you know? You dog moms know the type of strong-willed pup who hates and won't tolerate brushing, right?? My mom buys every brush people say is good and tests them all on me!! Ugh... 😭😭 I hate it so much, but among the few brushes that I, Deputy Chief Kuru, can actually tolerate, the <Tiny Brush> is literally the best!! I'm genuinely impressed. I'm a stylish executive who does some serious grooming with the Tiny Brush right when I get to work!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
너무너무 만족하는 제품이예요! 무겁지도 않고 가볍고 무엇보다 이 제품으로 빗질하면 구석구석 잘 빗을 수 있고 털이 살아나요! 저희집 강아지 지못미이지만 한번 빗질로 털이 부드러워지는게 느껴져서 나만알고싶은 제품입니다! 무조건 쟁이세요! 저도 한개 더 사놓을 예정이예요💛 
빗질을 싫어했던 아이인데 아주 편안하게 있더라구요~
reviews.content_en:
I'm SO satisfied with this product! It's not heavy, it's light, and most importantly, brushing with this product lets me brush every nook and cranny so well, and my fur comes alive! My pup isn't ugly or anything, but I can feel her fur getting softer with just one brushing session, so it's a product I want to keep secret just for myself! You absolutely have to get this! I'm planning to buy one more 💛
My dog used to hate getting brushed, but she was very calm and relaxed with this one~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
도담이는 빗질 정말 혐오할정도로 싫어하는데 
( 물론 지금도 좋아하는건 아님 어미의 빗질 집착은 점점 늘어가지만 )
이걸 쓰고는 전에 쓰던 빗보다는 거부감이 덜하더라구요 ?! 

사이즈는 정말 만족 ◡̈ ! 
컬러는 또 뭐시 이렇게 귀여울수가있나유 노 ~ 래가지고 (´▽`ʃƪ)♡
딱 귀여워 죽어버림 ( ;ᯅ; )

빗 빗기는 느낌도 증말 스무스하니 최고라니까요 ꯁ.̮ꯁ

그래서 도담이 콤빗 빼고 다른빗은 다 내다버려버렸어요 ! ! 

무게도 가볍고, 할 일도 잘하는데 
가격은 바잇미 어플로 12.510원에 착한가격에 겟또 했어요 ⚈͒◡⚈͒

써보고싶은게 너무 많은 어미라 앞으로 바잇미 열심히 파볼 예정이에요 !

여튼 저는 제돈주고 제가 샀지만 진짜 너무 잘 산것같아 🐶만족
하나 더 장만 할 예정입니다 !
요런 빗이라면 고민할거없이 선물용으로도 너무 좋을것같아요 ! (❛◡❛)✿
reviews.content_en:
Dotam really hates brushing to the point of disgust
(Of course, she doesn't like it now either, but mom's obsession with brushing keeps growing lol)
But after using this, she seems to resist it way less than with my old brush?!

The size is really satisfying ◡̈!
And the color?? How can it be THIS cute?? No way ~~ I'm obsessed with it (´▽`ʃƪ)♡
It's just so adorable I could die ( ;ᯅ; )

The brushing feeling is so smooth too, it's literally the best ꯁ.̮ꯁ

So I threw away all the other brushes except Dotam's comb!

It's lightweight AND does the job well, and
I got it at the nice price of 12,510 won through the BITE ME app ⚈͒◡⚈͒

I'm a mom who wants to try so many things, so I'm planning to explore BITE ME products a lot more going forward!

Anyway, I bought it with my own money, but I really feel like I made an amazing purchase 🐶 satisfied
I'm planning to get one more!
With a brush like this, you wouldn't have to think twice - it would be perfect as a gift too! (❛◡❛)✿

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 슬리커 찾고있던차에 타임세일을 하더라구요! 잘됐다싶어 사보았는데 슬리커만 들면 도망가던 우리아이 요건 신기하게도 빗어달라고하기보단 이 슬리커로 긁어달라는? 느낌인듯요. 계속해달래서 깜놀할정도! 작은 슬리커여도 우리아이에겐 크고 빗질하는게 안보여서 아파했는데 이건 작아서 빗질하는곳이 잘보이고 각도도 편하니 해주는사람도 편하고 빗질받는아이도 아파하지 않아서 대만족입니다. 진작살껄 그랬어요. 디자인이며 색깔이며 다 맘에들고 갖고있는 긴빗이랑 색이 비슷하여 세트느낌나서 더 좋았어요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast, and I was looking for a slicker when they had a flash sale! I thought I'd hit the jackpot and bought it, and here's the thing - our pup who used to run away from the slicker is acting like she wants me to scratch her WITH this one, not brush her? That's the vibe I'm getting. She keeps asking me to keep going, I was so shocked! Even though my old small slicker is small, it's too big for our pup and I can't see where I'm brushing, so it hurt her. But this one's small enough that I can see exactly where I'm brushing and the angle is comfortable, so it's comfortable for me to use and our pup doesn't cry in pain - I'm absolutely thrilled! I should've bought this sooner. I love the design and color, and it matches the set color of the long brush I already have, so it feels even better having them as a set!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 기존에 쓰던 슬리커가 날카롭고 면적도 넓어서 얼굴 빗기도 쉽지않고 제 손도 몇번 긁히고 아가도 아파해서 구매해봤는데 너~~오무 좋아요 크기가 적당해서 얼굴도 잘 빗어져서 드디어 빵실빵실을 만들어보았습니다… 빠진 털도 연근처럼 쑥 잘 빠지고 아파하지도 않고 무엇보다 각도 덕분에 편해요!
reviews.content_en: My old slicker brush was sharp and had a wide surface area, so it was hard to brush her face and I even scratched my own hand a few times, and it hurt her too. So I bought this one and it's ~~SO good! The size is just right, so I can brush her face really well and finally I've managed to create that fluff! The loose fur comes out nicely like lotus root, she doesn't cry in pain, and most of all, thanks to the angle, it's so much easier to use!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
어머어머어머~~~~~~
머선일인가요? 배송이 무슨총알보다 더빠른듯ㅋㅋㅋ
인스타 아랑이네 언니랑아랑이 캐미가 너무잼나서 자주들러서 보고있어요~보다가 오랜기간 심의를기우려ㅋ 만들어서
출시된 슬리커가 눈에 확띠더라구요~
2.6키로 1년2개월된 블랙토이푸들 딸램 키우고있는데
기존에 슬리커들은 소형견들한테는 좀큰감이 없지않아있었어여~나름 뽕빨살려주기위해 여러가지 바꿔가며 사용했지만
딱 만족할만한제품은 못찾았구요… 근데 배송받자마자 사용했거든요 와……사이즈 너무너무좋구요 딱이예요딱!!!
뽕 제대로 사네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 푸들이랑 매일빗질 않해주면 엉켜서 난리인데 이슬리커로 삭삭 빗어주니 뽀송뽀송해져여~~
칼라는 또 산뜻한 개나리노랑색💛
사은품으로 주신 해어롤장난감도 좋아하구요 
무엇보다 슬리커 너무 잘만드셨어요~~~
가격도 너무 착하고 작은아이키우시는분들은 이슬리커는
정말이지 최고예요👍
reviews.content_en:
Oh my goodness oh my goodness~~~~~~
What is this?? The shipping is faster than a bullet lol
I check out A-Rang's Instagram so often because the chemistry between big sister A-Rang and A-Rang is so fun~ and while I was watching, I spent a long time deliberating lol, and then when the slicker came out, it really caught my eye~
I'm raising a 2.6kg, 1-year-2-month-old black Toy Poodle girl, and the existing slickers are honestly a bit too big for toy-sized dogs~ I tried various ones to get the best results, but I couldn't find a product I was truly satisfied with... but I used it right after receiving it and wow... the size is SO good, it's perfect, just perfect!!!
I'm getting my money's worth lol 😂😂😂 My poodle gets tangled up if I don't brush her every day, but with this slicker I brush her smooth and fluffy~~
The color is that fresh forsythia yellow 💛
She also loves the hair roller toy you included as a gift
But most of all, you made such an amazing slicker~~~
The price is so reasonable too, and for anyone raising a small dog, this slicker is
truly the best 👍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아직 베넷털이 남아있어 좀힘이없는 비숑에머리를가지고있는 울강지
그래서 빗질이더욱 필요하고자주하는편인데요
밖에나갈땐 큰빗더욱 번거롭고 자리도차지하더라구요
보자마자 이거다싶어 구입했어여 우선크기가 제일맘에드네여
오자마자빗질해보았는데 가볍고 그립감도괜찮습니다
핀도깊은편이라 비숑한테는괜찮은거같아여^^
만족해요 재구매의사 있어여~
reviews.content_en:
My Kangji still has some baby coat left so doesn't have much strength, and she has a Bichon Frise head of hair,
so brushing is even more necessary and I do it frequently.
When I go out, the big brush is inconvenient and takes up space, so
I saw this and thought "this is it!" and bought it. First of all, I love the size the most!
I tried brushing right when it arrived and it's light and has a good grip.
The pins are pretty deep so it seems okay for a Bichon ^^
I'm satisfied! I'd definitely repurchase~

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
나 진짜 왜 이거 이제야 산거지 억만전 후회중..^^
주인놈이 일단 집에 빗 많다고 맨 처음 나왔을 때 안사고 미루다가 혹시 필요할까 해서 이제야 구매한거 같은데 못난 우리 주인을 용서해죠..~.~
일단 가볍고 작아서 다리 쪽 빗기 너무너무 좋고 우리 갱얼쥐가 아파하는거 같지도 않아서 너무 죠아욤 🤤
reviews.content_en:
I seriously regret why I didn't buy this sooner..^^
My human had a ton of brushes at home, so when this first came out I didn't buy it and kept putting it off, but then thought maybe we need it and finally bought it now. Please forgive my clumsy human~.~
First of all, it's light and small so it's SO great for brushing the leg area, and our hamster doesn't seem to be in pain, so I absolutely love it 🤤

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우왕 넘 좋아요!
인스타에서 다른 강아지가 사용하는거 보고 구매했는데
평소 사용하던 빗보다 헤드가 작고 가벼워서
아직 어리고 작은 저의 집 댕댕이 빗질하기에 최고네요!
이거 사용하고는 빗질할때 얌전히 잘 있어요
활용도도 넘 좋구요!
색감도 이쁘고 넘 만족💛
reviews.content_en:
Wow, I love it so much!
I saw another dog using it on Instagram and bought it,
and compared to the brush I usually use, the head is smaller and lighter,
so it's perfect for brushing my young, small pup!
Since I started using this, she sits nicely and still when I brush her.
It's so versatile too!
The color is pretty and I'm so satisfied 💛

reviews.name: T****
reviews.content:
3견종 3사이즈 4나이 다 쓰기 좋더라구요ㅎㅎ
모량이 줄어드는 노견들도 아파하지 않고, 풍성하고 엉킨 털 풀어줘야하는 애도, 소심이 멈머도 딱이에요. 
타이니슬리커는 애개이모가, 헤어롤장난감은 애개들이 다 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Works great for 3 different breeds, 3 different sizes, and 4 different ages haha! Even the older dogs with thinning fur don't feel pain, and it's perfect for fluffy, tangled coats, and even for my shy pup. The Tiny Slicker is love for my dogs, and they all love the hair roll toy haha

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
일단 머리빗는거 겁나 싫어하고 몸만지는것도 싫어해서 높은곳에 올려놓고 빗질 하는 비숑 견주입니다
유명한 슬리커브러쉬 살까하다 상품평 괜찮아서 구매해봤는데
일단 아파하지 않는거같아서 너무 좋아요
작은 브러쉬도 있어야겠더라구요
겨드랑이 털 잘 뭉치는데 거기도 살살 빗질합니다
큰빗으론 좀 힘들어요
큰빗은 몸통이나 꼬리 빗을때 유용하고
지금 몸을 스포팅해서 잘 안쓰게되더라구요
아주 만족합니다
고민말고 작은빗 필요하면 사세요
reviews.content_en: So, I'm a Bichon owner who puts my dog up high to brush because she absolutely hates having her head brushed and doesn't like being touched at all. I was thinking about getting a famous slicker brush, but the reviews looked good so I gave this a try, and I'm so happy because it doesn't seem to hurt! I think I need a smaller brush too. Her underarm fur gets tangled a lot, so I brush it gently there. The big brush is a bit difficult for that area. The big brush is useful for brushing the body and tail, but since I've been doing spot grooming lately, I don't use it as much. I'm very satisfied. Don't overthink it—if you need a small brush, just buy it.

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content: 약 일주일가량 매일 사용해보고 후기 남깁니다! 저희 강아지는 믹스견이고 비숑이나 푸들 친구처럼 꼬불거리는 털이 아니라서 이런 슬리커 형식의 빗은 딱히 필요없다고 생각했었는데요, 첫날에는 사진처럼 가르마가 생긴 머리 쪽만 빗어줬는데 머리가 뽕긋해지면서(유지기간은 짧았지만요) 동글동글 얼굴로 돌아왔어요ㅎㅎ 근데 일주일동안 몸 전체를 빗어주면서 느낀 점은 얼굴뿐만 아니라 몸 전체가 생크림마냥 부드러워졌어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 이전에는 얘 몸 볼 때마다 털이 왜저렇게 거칠거칠해보이지, 뻐셔(?)보이지, 투박해보이지, 등 고민이 매우 많았는데요ㅜㅜ 어느날부턴가 털에서 윤기가 숑숑 나고 그냥 만지기만해도 무슨 실크만지는 것처럼 보드라워요 그냥 딱 봤을 때는 오~ 싶은데 만져보면 확실히 달라졌다는 게 느껴져요! 엉킨털 풀어주는데에 엄청 효과적이구요, 기존에 쓰던 빗은 쉐드킬러였어요 얘는 죽은털 잘 뽑아주는데 털이 에뻐지는 느낌은 딱히 없고 정돈만 되더라구요 이젠 쉐드킬러랑 이 슬리커랑 번갈아가면서 쓰니까 말랑말랑강아지 됐습니닿ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 아주 만족스러워요ㅠㅠ!!! 참고로 저희 강아지는 원래도 빗질 잘하는 편이라 이 슬리커로 빗어주면 잘잡니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I'm leaving a review after using this for about a week every day! My dog is a mixed breed and doesn't have curly fur like Bichon or Poodle friends, so I thought this slicker-type brush wasn't really necessary. On the first day, I only brushed the parted section in the photo, and her head got all fluffy (though it didn't last long) and her face became round again hehe. But after brushing her whole body for a week, I noticed that not just her face but her entire body became soft like whipped cream lololol. Before, every time I looked at her body I'd think why does the fur look so rough, bristly, and clumpy, and I had so many worries about it ㅜㅜ But from some point on, her fur started shining beautifully and just touching it feels like touching silk—it's so soft! At first glance it's like "oh!" but when you touch it you definitely feel the difference! It's super effective at untangling fur. My previous brush was a shedding tool, and this one removes dead hair well too, but it doesn't have that feeling of pulling fur unnaturally—it just tidies it up. Now I alternate between the shedding tool and this slicker and my pup has become nice and soft hehehehe. I'm very satisfied ㅠㅠ!!! By the way, my dog has always been good at being brushed, so this slicker captures the fur well hehe

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
슬리커 아파해서 잘 안쓰다가 작은 슬리커 이기도 하고 요즘 겨드랑이랑 귀아래, 가슴털 등 털도 많이 엉켜서 고민하고있었는데요. 바잇미 인스타 보고 혹해서 구매했더니 글쎄 빠른배송으로 1차 감동ㅠ 아이 빗겨보고 또 잘 빗겨지면서 애 털이 살아나길래 2차감동ㅜㅠㅠ 너무너무 잘샀어요!!
아이가 원래 빗만 들면 도망갔는데 아픈빗 아니라도 막 도망다녔거든요. 근데 이 빗은 제일 아프게 생겼는데도 촉감이 막 엄청 나쁘진 않은가봐요! 쿠션감이 있어서 그런지 너무 좋네요. 앞으로 어디 외출할때마다 필수로 들고다닐거같아요!!
사진 보이시나요!! 원래 망고 털 맨날 삐죽삐죽하고 엉켜있고 이랬는데 슬리커로 빗고 나니 이게 웬걸ㅠㅠ 다른 강아지가 나타났ㅅ어요..... 누구니 너.....
reviews.content_en: I wasn't using the slicker much because it hurt, but since it's a small slicker and lately her underarm, behind-ear, and chest fur have been getting really tangled, I was worried about it. I saw BITE ME on Instagram and was tempted to buy it, and wow—fast shipping gave me my first wow moment ㅠ When I brushed my pup and the fur brushed so nicely and her hair came alive, that was my second wow moment ㅜㅠㅠ I bought this so well!! My pup used to run away whenever I picked up a brush, and she'd run away even from brushes that didn't hurt. But even though this brush looks the scariest, the feel isn't that bad apparently! It must be because of the cushioning, it's so nice. From now on I'm bringing it everywhere we go!! Do you see the photos!! Mango's fur used to always stick up and be tangled, but after brushing with the slicker wow ㅠㅠ a different dog appeared..... who are you....

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
미니비숑 2키로초반이예요ㅎ 빗이 작아서 얼굴빗기에도 너무 편하고 가볍고 잘빗겨지고 좋아요! 어디 나갈때도 챙겨나가기 부담없고요ㅎ 가성비가 끝내주고 쁘띠쁘띠하니 예쁘기까지해요ㅎ 소형견에겐 전신 사용하기에도 궂이 이거이상 필요없겠구나 싶었어요ㅎㅎ 얼티랑 아랑이빗 두개를 이곳에서 샀는데요ㅋ 두개갖고쓰니 딱좋아요ㅎㅎ 
망가지면 다시 사고싶을정도로 만족입니다^^
사이즈 비교차 얼티랑 같이놓고 찍어 올려봅니다ㅎ
아랑이빗 바잇미빗 진심으로 좋아요👍
reviews.content_en: I have a mini Bichon that weighs just over 2kg hehe. The brush is small so it's super convenient and light for brushing her face, and it brushes so well! It's easy to carry when we go out too hehe. The value for money is incredible and it's so cute and pretty hehe. For a small dog, I felt like you don't really need anything bigger than this for full-body use hehe. I bought both Arati and Arangi brushes from here lol, and having both works perfectly hehe. If it breaks I'd want to buy it again, that's how satisfied I am ^^ I'm uploading a size comparison photo with Arati here hehe. Arangi brush and BITE ME brush are seriously so good 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 첫구매해봤어요!
저희 댕댕이는 견종이 비숑이긴하지만 
모질이 거칠지않고 베냇털처럼 얇아서 
조금만 방심해도 속털부터 뭉쳐지는 아이랍니다🥲
기존에 플러시퍼피슬리커 하나만 사용했었는데
서브로 작은 슬리커도 필요하다고 느꼈었어요
바잇미 구경하다가 
타이니 슬리커를 보고 딱이라고 느껴서 바로 구매했습니다!
바잇미 미스트를 뿌려주고 바로 사용해봤는데
얼굴쪽이나 귀뒤쪽에 뭉친 털 풀기에는
사이즈가 작아서 매우 좋았어요! 
색감도 예쁘고 빗질도 잘되서 
기존 슬리커로 전체적으로 빗질해주고 
서브 슬리커로 쓰기엔 정말 좋은 슬리커입니다!
같이주신 헤어롤 장난감도 뜯자마자
실컷 던지고 물고 핥고 너무 좋아하네요🧡
아! 장난감에 있는 찍찍이는 머리에 붙이라고 있는건가요?!
참고로 머리에 잘 붙지는 않습니다😅
바잇미 첫 구매 너무 만족합니다💛🧡💛
reviews.content_en: I made my first BITE ME purchase! My pup is a Bichon but has soft, thin fur like baby hair, so even if I'm not careful the undercoat gets matted 🥲. I was only using one Plush Puppy slicker before and I felt like I needed a smaller slicker as a backup. I was looking at BITE ME and saw the Tiny Slicker and felt like it was exactly what I needed, so I bought it right away! I sprayed BITE ME mist and tried it right away, and the small size was really great for untangling matted fur around the face and behind the ears! The color is pretty and it brushes so well, so after brushing overall with my existing slicker, this smaller slicker is really great to use as a secondary brush! She also absolutely loves the hair roll toy that came with it—she started throwing, biting, and licking it right away 🧡. Oh! Is that velcro on the toy supposed to stick to her hair?! Just so you know, it doesn't stick very well to hair 😅. I'm so satisfied with my first BITE ME purchase 💛🧡💛

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 평소에 큰 브러쉬는 너무 싫어해서 구매해봤는데  요거는 작아서 좋아해요!! 특히 겨드랑이쪽 할때 편해요!!
reviews.content_en: I usually hate the big brush so I bought this, and she likes it because it's small!! It's especially convenient for her underarms!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
이건 무조건 구매하세요
귀여운건 말해뭐해요 휴대성 좋고 빗질은 와!!! 너무 잘되여
겨드랑이 볼 귀 구석구석 넘. 잘되네요
reviews.content_en: You absolutely have to buy this. No need to mention how cute it is—it's portable and the brushing is wow!!! It brushes so well. Underarms, cheeks, ears, every corner works so well.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이런 써글 . . 울 어매 빗질 재밌어 진다고 . . 저걸 썰어말어 🔪
작은 사이즈여서 숨어있는 곳 까지 꼼꼼 하게 빗질 할 수 있어 좋아요
겨드랑이 , 다리 접히는 부분 , 발 , 귀뒷부분 빗기 편하고
산책 후 발 말리면서 발 빗기는 거에 최고인 거 같아요
헤어롤 장난감도 엄청 좋아 하네요 🌝 큰 사이즈 버전 나와도 좋을 거 같아요 너무 잘 빗기고 좋아요 👍👍
reviews.content_en: Seriously this thing... made brushing fun for my mom... you could say she's hooked on it 🔪. Because it's a small size, I can brush even hidden spots thoroughly. It's convenient for brushing the underarms, leg creases, paws, and behind the ears, and it seems perfect for brushing the paws while drying them after a walk! She loves the hair roll toy so much too 🌝. I think a bigger size version would be great too. It brushes so well and I love it 👍👍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 쪼꼬미한 우리 애기한테 너무 좋아요! 귀뒤, 사타구니는 물론이구요 다리쪽도 쪼금씩 살살 빗을 수 있어서 너무 좋아요. 하나 더 쟁여놓으려구요!
reviews.content_en: It's so great for my little pup! Not just behind the ears and groin area, but I can also gently brush her legs little by little, so it's perfect. I'm planning to get one more!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
털이 곱슬곱슬한 비숑이를 키우고 있어서 슬리커는 필수에요. 시중 플러피슬리커를 쓰고있는데 몸통할때는 너무 좋지만 얼굴할때는 이리저리 돌리고 불편해해요. 타콤브러쉬 가볍게 쓸려고 직구했는데 금방 녹슬어버렸네요.. 그런데 바잇미에서 얼굴에하기 딱 좋은 사이즈같아서 주문했는데 정말 딱 좋네요.
같이 받은 트릿간식도 잘먹길래 주문하러 들어왔어요.
reviews.content_en: I have a Bichon with coarse, fluffy fur, so a slicker brush is essential. I've been using a fluffy slicker from a regular store—it works great on the body, but it's awkward and uncomfortable when doing the face. I ordered a Tacomb brush online thinking it would be lighter, but it rusted quickly. Then I saw that BITE ME had a size that looked perfect for the face, so I ordered it and it's honestly perfect! 😊 My pup also loved the treats that came with it, so I came back to order more.

reviews.name: 명****
reviews.content: 타이니 슬리커 브러쉬는 외출할때마다 꼭 챙겨가는 산책가방의 필수품이 되었어요! 적닥한 빗의 길이감도  아프지 않게 빗겨지는 느낌도 비숑특유의 빵빵함이 매력인 하이바를 잘 살려주니 사랑하지 않을수가 없어요! 인스타에 출시되었다는 피드를 보자마자 구입했는데 정말 대만족이예요!
reviews.content_en: The Tiny Slicker Brush has become an essential item in my dog's walk bag that I bring everywhere! 🐶 I absolutely love it because the brush length is just right, it doesn't hurt when brushing, and it really brings out the signature fluffiness that makes Bichons so adorable! I bought it as soon as I saw it announced on Instagram, and I'm honestly so satisfied!

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 슬리커 큰거는 있는데 작은게 없어서 얼굴쪽 빗으려고 구매햇어요 작아서 입주변이나 귀뒤 빗을때 넘좋네여 푹신해서 애들도 안아파해요^^
reviews.content_en: I already have a large slicker brush, but didn't have a small one, so I bought this to brush my pup's face. It's perfect for brushing around the mouth and behind the ears because it's so small! It's soft and gentle so my babies don't feel any pain ^^

reviews.name: 길****
reviews.content:
그냥 최고라는 말밖에 안 나와요
값도 너무 저렴해서 솔직히 별로 기대 안 했지만 너어무 만족해요 일단 너무 가볍고 슬리커만 들면 도망가는 아이였는데 누워서 잠을 잔다구여ㅠㅠ 전에 쓰던 슬리커도 다들 아실만한 아이들이 아파하지 않는다 해서 산 브랜드였는데 무게도 있다 보니 저도 모르게 빗질을할때 힘이 들어가서 아파하더라고요 근데 타이니 슬리커는 짱 가벼워서 손에 힘도 안 들어가고 너무 맘에 들어요 다들 사세여 다른 색상도 나왔으면 좋을 거 같아요❤
reviews.content_en: Honestly, there's nothing else to say but that it's the best 😭 The price was so affordable that I didn't expect much, but I'm SO satisfied! First of all, it's incredibly light, and my pup used to run away whenever I'd bring out a slicker brush, but now she just lies down and falls asleep while I brush her ㅠㅠ The slicker brush I used before was from a well-known brand that people say doesn't hurt dogs, but because it was heavy, I'd unconsciously put too much pressure when brushing and my pup would be in pain. But the Tiny Slicker is SO light that my hand doesn't tense up at all and I'm really happy with it! Everyone should buy this 😍 I hope they release other colors too ❤

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 일단 파스텔 톤? 이라구 할까요 옐로우 색상이 너무 너무 귀여워요! 크기도 작아서 사이사이 꼼꼼하게 해줄 수 있어서 좋아요!! 더군다나 이런 착한 가격이라니❤️ 페이스콤도 나왔으면 좋겠어용❤️
reviews.content_en: The pastel yellow color is SO cute! 💛 The small size is great because I can brush in between areas carefully! Plus, at such a great price ❤️ I hope they release a face comb version too ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 오자마자 보니까 사이즈가 딱 좋네요 기존 다른 제품을 제가 너무 큰걸로 샀는데 빗기니까 싫어하더라구 왜지?하고 제가 한번 긁어봤는데 너무 심하게 스크래치가 나네요 피도나고 그래서 이번에 바꾸자싶어서 아랑님 인스타보고 타이니슬리커나오길래 이거다 싶어서 바꿨는데 너무 잘 바꾼거 같아요 제 살에 긁어보니까 많이 아프지도 않고 스크래치도 덜 남네요 ^^ 잘 써볼게요~~헤어롤 장난감에 간식까지 이 가격에 👍 이에요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: The size is perfect right out of the box! I bought a different brand's larger size before, and my pup didn't like it when I'd brush with it. I scratched myself with it out of curiosity and wow—it left deep scratches and even drew blood 😟 So I decided to switch, and after seeing Arang's Instagram, the Tiny Slicker came out and I thought 'this is it!' I switched to it and it was such a good decision! When I tested it on my own skin, it doesn't hurt as much and leaves fewer scratches ^^ I'll use it well~~ Hair roller toy and treats included at this price 👍

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 아랑이 보고 무조건구입 근데 진짜 작아서 넘 좋아요  빗질싫어하는데 요건 곧잘하네요  같이온 토이를 아이가 너무 좋아해요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Had to get it after seeing Arang 😍 It's really small so it's perfect! My pup usually hates brushing, but uses this one without complaint! My baby absolutely loves the toy that came with it ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: h****
reviews.content:
작아서 너무 좋아요! 상세 설명대로 귀뒤에
빗기에도 좋고 세세하게 뽕 살릴 수 있어서 좋고 색깔도 예쁘고 귀야워용>.< 구르프 인형 장난감도 기엽구요ㅎㅎ! 머리 빗고 올려줬어요
reviews.content_en: I love how small it is! 😊 It's perfect for brushing behind the ears just like the description says, and I can really bring out all those fluffy details! The color is pretty and adorable >_< The Gruf plush toy that came with it is cute too ㅎㅎ! I brush and style my pup's hair with it.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 놀러가는 길에 급하게 후기 ㅋㅋㅋ 아랑이 인스타 보고 혹해서 샀는데 휴대용으로 쓰기 정말 좋아요 가방에 쏙 들어가가지구. 4키로 후반 이슬아슬 털빵왕 비숑인데 구석구석 잘 빗어집니다!! 핀 아프다는 분들도 계신데 그냥 보통의 슬리커랑 비슷한 것 같아요. 볼 잇는 것도 애기들 피부엔 안닿게 빗는게 좋으니까 머,, 좁은 부위 신경써서 빗어주기 좋고 무엇보다 기여워서ㅜㅜ 빗는 제가 더 재미써요 후후
reviews.content_en: Writing this review in a rush on the way to go out ㅋㅋㅋ I saw Arang's Instagram and was so tempted I bought it, and it's really great for portability! It fits perfectly in my bag. My Bichon is almost 4kg and is a total fluffball, and this brushes every nook and cranny really well!! Some people mention the pins hurt, but it seems similar to a regular slicker to me. Since it's better not to let the ball part touch puppies' skin anyway, it's good for carefully brushing those tight areas, and most of all it's SO CUTE that I have more fun brushing than my pup does 🥺

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 조금 아픈 것 같기도 하지만 기존에 사용하던 것보다는 소프트한 편이에요. 작아서 털 정리해주기 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It feels a little painful, but it's softer than what I was using before. Being small makes it great for tidying up the fur!

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content: 작고 기여워요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ같이준인형도 기엽구용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so small and cute lol 😂 The included toy is adorable too hehe 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우선 휴대용을 찾고 있었는데, 망가질 수 있고 무게감들이 조금 나가기도 하고? 차량에 두고 사용할 수 있는걸 찾았는데..... 진짜 가볍고 따악좋아요ㅠㅠ 진짜 대만족이요... 바잇미에서 항상 사는 제품들은 다 만족하는거 같아요! 크리슨이랑 비교한 사이즈 참고하세요:)
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a portable option, but some can break easily and feel a bit heavy? Then I found one I could keep in my car..... and it's seriously so light and I absolutely love it ㅠㅠ I'm really super satisfied... I always buy products from BITE ME and they're all great! Check out the size comparison with Crimson :)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 슬리커가 생각보다 커서 얼굴 부분할때 눈에 찔릴까봐 늘 겁났었는데 크기가 작아지니까 좁은부위도 할수있어서 좋아요! 장난감도 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en: The slicker brush was bigger than I expected so I was always worried it might poke my dog's eyes when brushing the face area, but now that it's smaller, I can do the tight spots too! The toy is cute!

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content: 쪼꼬매서 구석구석 잘 빗겨져요 아파하지도 않고 가만히 있네여 ㅎㅎ 같이온 구르프 장난감 엄청 좋아해요… 하루종일 던져딜라고 가쟈옴,,ㅜㅜㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so tiny that it brushes through every nook and cranny really well, and it doesn't hurt—he just stays still hehe 😊 He absolutely loves the Gorp toy that came with it... he wants me to throw it all day long ㅜㅜ lol

reviews.name: h****
reviews.content: 귀염뽀짝해요 작아서 휴대성도 좋은거 같아요
reviews.content_en: It's adorable! Since it's small, it seems really portable too 💕

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
이거 개발한 사람은 천재다. 상줘야한다. 
우리집 비숑이 빗질 싫어하고 온갖 비싼 빗 사서 다 해봤다. 플러쉬 퍼피 슬리커는 3종 있다. 빗을 때 버둥거리고 도망가고 간식줘도 안먹고 안빗는다 ㅜㅜ. 어쩔 수 없이 종종 빡숑이 될 수 밖에 없는데, 바잇미 아랑 타이니 슬리커 리뷰에 아이가 빗질을 해도 가만히 있는다길래 만원 버리는 셈 치고 주문했다. 웬걸..  박스에서 꺼내자 마자 노란색이 맘에 든건지 냄새도 맡고 좋아하더니 빗어주니 가만히 있다가 더 빗어주니 눕는다 더 빗으래. (여기서 오열함)  흑흑 빗이 작아 많이 빗어야하지만 아기가 편해하고 맘에 들어하니 많이 빗는  것 쯤이야 아무것도 아님. 레몬색 너무 예쁘고 그립감 짱좋아. ㅜㅜ 몇개 더 쟁일거에요.  다른 플리커 필요없엉.
reviews.content_en: Whoever invented this is a genius. They deserve an award. My Bichon hates grooming and I've tried all kinds of expensive brushes. I have 3 different Plush Puppy slickers. When I try to brush, he squirms, runs away, and won't even eat treats—just refuses to be brushed ㅜㅜ. So inevitably, he ends up looking like a shag carpet. But after reading reviews about the BITE ME Tiny Slicker where people said their dogs stay still even when kids brush them, I figured I'd throw away 10,000 won and just order it. Well... as soon as I took it out of the box, he liked the yellow color so much he sniffed it and loved it, and when I brushed him, he stayed still—then he lay down asking for more brushing. (I literally cried here) ㅜㅜ The brush is small so I have to brush more, but since my baby is comfortable and loves it, brushing more is nothing. The lemon yellow color is so pretty and the grip feels amazing. ㅜㅜ I'm going to buy a few more. Don't need any other slickers.

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
작고 타이니 스럽네용
제 손이 작아서 다른 슬리커는 사용하면 손가락이 아팠어요
일단 저희 강아지듀 맘에 드나봐요
삭삭 빗어주니 얌전히 잘있어요
아직 털이 덜 자란 비숑이라 하이바가 잘안되지만
꽤 빵실하게 올라오네요!

다 빗어내고 잔여털은 빗에서 완전히 빼내는건 불가능하지만 틈날때마다 빗어줄 수 있는 작고소중한슬리커에요
reviews.content_en: It's small and very tiny-like! 😊 My hands are small so using other slickers would hurt my fingers. My dogs seem to love it anyway. When I gently brush, they stay calm and quiet 😊 Since my Bichon's coat hasn't fully grown in yet, I don't get full volume, but it does come up pretty fluffily! It's impossible to completely remove all the remaining hair from the brush, but it's a small and precious slicker that I can use whenever I have a chance to brush.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 집에있던 슬리커는 저렴한 제품이라 푸들,비숑친구들이 빗질할때 아파해서 버리고 새제품찾다 괜찮아 보여서 구매하게 되었는데 빗질할때 전보다 덜 불편헤해서 좋네요 작아서 얼굴도 다 빗을수 있고 휴대하기도 좋은거 같아요
reviews.content_en: The slicker I had at home was a cheap product so Poodles and Bichon friends would feel pain during brushing, so I got rid of it and looked for a new one. This one looked good so I bought it, and it's much less inconvenient when brushing now 😊 Since it's small, I can brush the face completely and it seems great for portability too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 진짜 좋네요 그동안 얼굴 빗질 할때 페이스 빗이랑 콤으로만 하기엔 오래걸리고 슬리커로 하기엔 너무 커서 서로 불편했는데 ㅎㅎ 이건 사이즈가 얼굴에 딱이고 사이즈가 작아서 기능은 기대 안했는데 세상에 뽕도 엄청 잘 세워지고 엉킨털도 잘 걸러줘서 너무 좋아요 외출용으로도 딱입니다💕
reviews.content_en: It's really nice 😊 Before this, brushing the face was inconvenient—taking too long with just a face brush and comb, but the slicker was too big hehe 😄 This one is the perfect size for the face, and even though the size made me not expect much, surprisingly it lifts the coat beautifully and detangles really well, so I'm so happy! Perfect for taking on trips too 💕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
두번째 구입 입니다. 전에 산 빗이 어디로 갔는지 ㅜㅜ
털도 잘빗겨지고 우선 빗질하기 힘든 곱슬에 제격~빗보여주며 털빗자  하면 얼릉 달려와 바로 누워 버려요

엉킨털도 아프지 않게 잘 풀리고 죽은털도 잘 뭉쳐나와 넘 만족합니다..

다만 사이즈가 귀엽긴한데 조금 큰 사이즈도 있었으면 좋겠어요..5kg인 저희 댕댕이 전체 털 빗는 시간이 조금 걸리네요 ㅎㅎ
그래도 강추입니다^^
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase. The brush I bought before—not sure where it went ㅜㅜ. It brushes the coat really well and it's perfect for the difficult, coarse texture. When I show him the brush and start brushing, he comes running right over and lies down for more! Tangles come out painlessly and dead hair clumps out well, so I'm very satisfied. The only thing is, while the size is cute, I wish there was a slightly larger size too... My 5kg pup takes a little while to brush the whole coat hehe 😊. But I definitely recommend it ^^

reviews.name: 쩡****
reviews.content:
말티즈 키우고 있어서 털 엉킴 방지용으로 구매했어요.
노란색이라 보기만 해도 기분 좋아지고, 가볍고 그립감도 좋아서 매일 사용 중이에요.
빗살이 촘촘해서 속털까지 잘 정리되고, 자극도 적은 편이에요.
엉킨 부분도 살살 풀어주니 망고도 싫어하지 않고 가만히 있어요 😊

같이 보관하는 체크무늬 파우치에 쏙 들어가서 보관도 깔끔하게 돼서 만족! 계속 재구매중이에요^^
reviews.content_en: I got this to prevent matting since I have a Maltese. The yellow color makes me happy just looking at it, and it's light with a great grip, so I use it every day. The bristles are dense so it works well on the undercoat too, and it doesn't irritate the skin. When I gently detangle the matted parts, Mango doesn't mind and just sits still 😊 It fits perfectly in the checkered pouch I store it with, so it's easy to keep organized! I keep repurchasing it ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 슬리커브러쉬 큰사이즈만 있어서 얼굴처럼 섬세함이 필요한 빗질에 적절한 사이즈의 슬리커 브러쉬를 찾았는데 딱 원하는 브러쉬를 사서 너무 좋습니당! 우선 사이즈가 컴팩트하니까 얼굴빗질할때 너무 유용해요 그리구 애견카페나 외출시 휴대용으로도 좋구요 색상도 예뻐서 완전 만족합니당>_< 사용해보니 퐁실퐁실 털도 잘 빗겨용!
reviews.content_en: I could only find large slicker brushes, so I was looking for a more delicate size for grooming sensitive areas like the face, and I found exactly what I wanted! The compact size is super useful for face grooming, and it's also great as a portable brush for dog cafes or when going out. The color is pretty too, so I'm completely satisfied >_< When I use it, the fur brushes out so fluffy!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
사이즈 보시라고 콤비와 비교샷 올립니다..
생각 보다 작았어요;;
그래도 특히 푸들이 얼굴 빗기 좋구요
털이 쫙쫙 펴지는 느낌이에요 ㅋ
귀여워요^^
reviews.content_en: Posting a comparison shot with a combo so you can see the size... It was smaller than I expected;; But it's especially good for grooming a poodle's face. The fur spreads out really nicely lol It's cute ^^

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content:
친구 소개로 구매 했어요 
저희 대이이는 빗질을 너무 싫어하는데 이거로 살살 해주니까 가만히 있어요 ㅋㅋ
 아담해서 안경케이스에 딱 들어가요 너무 좋아요 😍
reviews.content_en: I bought it on a friend's recommendation. My Daeyi really hates grooming, but when I gently brush with this, she stays still haha It's so compact it fits perfectly in an eyeglass case. I love it 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 작고 귀엽고 가벼워요 ㅎ 살짝 하드한 느낌도 있어서 엉킨털 잘 풀려요 ㅎㅎ 애카가방에 넣고 다니면서 수시로 빗어주려고 하나 더 샀어용 ㅎㅎ 작은아가들 겨드랑이 빗어주기에 참좋네요 ㅎ 또 하나 더 사서 차에도 둘까 생각중이에요 ㅎ 가성비 짱인 빗
reviews.content_en: It's small, cute, and lightweight ㅎ It has a slightly firm feel so it detangles really well ㅎㅎ I bought another one to keep in my pet carrier and brush throughout the day ㅎㅎ It's great for grooming the underarms of little pups ㅎ I'm even thinking about getting one more for the car ㅎ This brush is unbeatable for the price

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 비숑 머즐 빗기고 싶어서 찾다가 발견한 미니 슬리커! 미니싸이즈고 빗질도 잘 되서 외출용으로도 사용하고 있어요! 비숑은 머즐+다리+겨드랑이 세심한 부분 빗기 딱 좋고 집에 있는 작은 말티즈는 전체 빗질하기 좋아요! ㅋㅋ 만족합니당
reviews.content_en: I found this mini slicker while looking for something to groom my Bichon's muzzle! It's mini-sized and brushes well, so I use it for grooming on the go too! For Bichons it's perfect for grooming the delicate areas—muzzle, legs, and underarms—and for the little Maltese I have at home it's great for full-body grooming! ㅋㅋ Very satisfied

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
사려고 벼르다가 까먹고 이번에 몰아서 사버린 슬리커 
중모 치와와로 살던 우리 통ki에게 이번 겨울은 찐 장모치와와의 삶을 선사해줬더니...털이
매번 콤으로 빗어주다가 그래 결심했어 슬리커로 빗어주는거야 하고 오늘 도착하자마자 빗어주니
어르신 시원한지 등도 대주고 난리네요
우선 등쪽부터 배쪽까지 자주긁는부분부터 꼬리까지 쓱쓱 한번씩  어르신 털은 장모치와와치고 빠지지않는편같고 엉킴이 없는편이라 쑥쑥 잘빗겨집니다
다만 나온 결과는 아주 만족스럽게 죽은털 쑥쑥 잘 뽑아주네요
어르신 만족스러우신듯합니다
슬리커 거부감없이 이제 이거로 맛사지 해드려야겠어요
그동안 손꾸락으로 긁어드리느라 관절나가는줄 알았는디
고마워요 바잇미
reviews.content_en: I kept putting off buying this slicker brush and then ended up ordering a bunch at once. My Tong-ki is a medium-haired Chihuahua, but this winter I gave him the life of a long-haired Chihuahua instead... and his fur used to be brushed with a comb every time, but I decided today—let's switch to a slicker—and as soon as it arrived, I brushed him and he's acting all relieved, even offering his back for more! Starting from his back down to his belly, the areas I often comb, all the way to his tail—swoosh swoosh—his long-haired Chihuahua fur doesn't shed much and has no matting, so it brushes beautifully. The result is very satisfying; it pulls out dead fur so well. He seems really pleased. I'll give him massages with this slicker without any resistance now. I thought my joints were going to give out from scratching with my fingernails all this time. Thank you BITE ME

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content:
2004년생. 남. 말티푸(푸들에 가까운 모질과 체형)
-
나이 들고 노화가 시작되며 시력이 떨어지니 빗질 잘 하던 아이가 빗질 그 감촉을 엄청 싫어하게 되더라구요. 말티푸지만 푸들털을 그대로 가진 아이라 빗질안하고 두면 잘 엉켜버리고 싫어한다고 넘기면 진짜 아예 손도 못델꺼같아 일어나면 빗질 이 루틴을 만들어 두고 하고 있어요. 브러쉬 바꿀때가 되어 찾던중 원래 사려던 유명 타브랜드 빗살(?)과 비슷하기도 했고 사이즈가 맘에 들어 구입해봤어요.
-
쓰던것과 닿는 느낌이 달라 역시나 경계하구요;; 천천히 적응 시키자는 생각에 쓰던것과 교차하며 쓰다가 오늘 아침, 산책하고 들어왔는데 귓털에 저렇게 먼지 같은게 뭉쳐 있더라구요. 이 브러쉬가 가까이 있어 턱 살짝 잡고 뭉친 귀털 이걸로 두어번 쓱쓱 빗으니 먼지 뭉치가 저렇게 딸려 나오네요. 우와하며 신뢰가 급 상승해ㅋ 주문했던 다른 상품들이랑 다써보고 같이 한꺼번에 후기 남길랬는데 이거부터 쓰게 된. 피부에 닿지 않게 살랑살랑 쓰면서 적응해나가면 곱슬털인 애들 이리저리 유용하게 쓰일듯.
reviews.content_en: Born in 2004. Male. Maltipoo (poodle-like coat and build) - As he's gotten older and aging has set in, his eyesight has declined, and even though he used to be fine with brushing, he now really dislikes how it feels. He's a Maltipoo but has pure poodle coat, so if I don't brush him he gets matted, and if I just skip it because he doesn't like it, I won't be able to touch him at all, so I've made brushing part of our morning routine. It was time to switch brushes, so I was looking around, and this was similar to the famous brand brush I originally wanted to buy, and I liked the size, so I gave it a try. - Since it feels different from what I was using, he was cautious at first;; I thought I'd slowly get him used to it, so I alternated between the old and new brush, and this morning when we came back from a walk, there was all this dust-like stuff clumped in his ear fur. I had this brush nearby, so I gently held his chin and brushed the matted ear fur a couple times swoosh swoosh, and the dust clump came right out. I was like wow, and my trust went up fast ㅋ I was planning to try the other products I ordered and leave feedback all at once, but I'm posting about this one first. If I use it gently with a light touch so it doesn't touch the skin, it seems like it'll be useful in all sorts of ways for dogs with curly fur.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 사용 하고있는 빗인데 다른빗 보다 사용하기도 좋고 일단 소형견인 울 아기에게 딱이네요~~  조바심에 여분으로다 재구매 했어요~^^
reviews.content_en: I'm using this brush and it works better than other brushes, and it's just perfect for my little small-breed pup~~ I anxiously repurchased it as a backup ~^^

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 첫째는 7개월된비숑인데 아직 털에 힘이없어서 미용해도 금방 민들레홀씨처럼 흩날려서 매일 빗질해주는데 조그만해서 턱이랑 겨드랑이 빗기기 좋을거같아서 샀는데 작은데도 뽕살리기 좋아요ㅋㅋㅋ신랑이 한번 빗기더니 오~~ 뽕살아난다 이러면서 좋아하더라구요 둘째도 3개월 조금 넘은 토이푸들인데 빗들이 다커서 구석진곳 빗기기가 조금 버거웠거든요ㅠㅠ 근데 이걸로 빗기니까 빗질하기가 훨씬 수월하고 애기가 아파하지도 않아요ㅎㅎㅎ 사은품으로 받은 헤어롤장난감은 저흽집 애기들은 아직 애기라 털에 힘이없어서인지 붙지않더라구요ㅠㅠ 그래서 잘씹고놀아요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ혹시 빗 고민중이신분들 사세요 저도 고민하다가 배송만 늦어졌어요❤
reviews.content_en: My first is a 7-month-old Bichon, and since her fur doesn't have strength yet, it scatters like dandelion seeds even right after grooming, so I brush her daily. I bought this thinking the small size would be good for brushing her chin and underarms, and even though it's small, it really makes the coat pop ㅋㅋㅋ My husband brushed her once and was like 'ooh the coat is coming in!' and loved it. My second is a toy poodle just over 3 months old, and her other brushes are too big making it hard to reach the corners ㅠㅠ But brushing with this makes it so much easier and doesn't hurt her ㅎㅎㅎ The hair roller toy I got as a gift doesn't stick to my babies' fur since they're still young without much coat strength ㅠㅠ So they just chew and play with it instead ㅋㅋㅋㅋ If anyone is thinking about getting a brush, just buy it. I was worried about it too but it was just the shipping that was delayed ❤
